questions.q: Does pollPersistence.ts use idb-keyval with the key pattern quizzl:polls:{groupId}?
Does savePoll perform upsert (not duplicate) by poll id?
Does saveVote use compound key {pollId}:{voterPubkey} for LWW?
Do all parsePollX functions return null for malformed input?
Does clearPollData remove both polls and associated votes?
Are write operations serialized per-key to avoid race conditions?
